# CWE-358 safe: Improperly Implemented Security Check for Standard (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-358-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/base64"
	"encoding/json"
	"errors"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

func ExtractBearerClaims(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) error {
	raw := r.Header.Get("Authorization")
	token := strings.TrimPrefix(raw, "Bearer ")
	parts := strings.Split(token, ".")
	if len(parts) != 3 {
		return errors.New("invalid jwt structure")
	}
	headerJSON, _ := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[0])
	var header struct {
		Alg string `json:"alg"`
	}
	_ = json.Unmarshal(headerJSON, &header)
	if header.Alg != "RS256" {
		return errors.New("unsupported jwt algorithm")
	}
	payload, _ := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[1])
	var claims map[string]interface{}
	_ = json.Unmarshal(payload, &claims)
	out, _ := json.Marshal(claims)
	w.Write(out)
	return nil
}
